brand.name: HAKKIVEDA
brand.tagline: Hakki Pikki Tribal Wisdom, Ayurvedic Healing
brand.description: A premium luxury Ayurvedic e-commerce website inspired by the centuries-old herbal knowledge of the Hakki Pikki Tribe. Combines authentic tribal wisdom with Ayurveda to create natural, effective, premium products for hair care, skin care, and personal wellness.

theme.mood: Premium, Elegant, Luxury, Modern, Minimal, Clean, Trust, Nature, Heritage
theme.spacing_philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8 to p-32) to create breathing room. The UI should feel like a luxurious spa experience.

grid_strategy.featured_products: Bento Grid (asymmetric) to showcase star products like Adivasi Herbal Hair Oil.
grid_strategy.shop_listing: Symmetrical 3-column or 4-column grid with generous gap-8 for premium feel.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-[#0F5B3A] text-[#FAF8F3] hover:bg-[#C9A227] hover:text-[#222222] transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-3 text-sm tracking-wider uppercase
buttons.secondary: rounded-full border-2 border-[#0F5B3A] text-[#0F5B3A] hover:bg-[#0F5B3A] hover:text-[#FAF8F3] transition-colors duration-300 px-8 py-3 text-sm tracking-wider uppercase

cards.product: bg-white rounded-xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.03)] border border-[#0F5B3A]/10 overflow-hidden hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgba(15,91,58,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
cards.testimonial: bg-[#FAF8F3] border border-[#C9A227]/30 rounded-2xl p-8 italic

navigation.style: Crystal Glassmorphism on scroll (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF8F3]/80 border-b border-[#0F5B3A]/10)
navigation.links: text-[#222222] hover:text-[#0F5B3A] font-medium text-sm uppercase tracking-widest transition-colors

animations.reveal: Framer Motion staggered fade-up for product grids and text blocks.
animations.hover: Subtle image scale-up (1.05) within overflow-hidden containers for products.

pages_blueprint.name: Homepage
sections: Hero: Full height, immersive nature background with elegant typography and dual CTAs.
Marquee: Slow-moving editorial ribbon with tagline 'Hakki Pikki Tribal Wisdom • Ayurvedic Healing'.
Best Sellers: Asymmetric grid showcasing Top 3 products.
Collections: Hair Care & Skin Care split sections with imagery.
Heritage (About): Story of the Hakki Pikki tribe with earthy, grounded visuals.
Ingredients Showcase: High-end macro shots of herbs/gold leaf.
Testimonials: Elegant slider with soft shadows.
AI Features: Promo for 'AI Hair & Skin Quiz' for personalized routines.

pages_blueprint.name: Shop
features: Clean product grid with Add to Cart / Wishlist quick actions.

pages_blueprint.name: Product Detail
features: Sticky product info on right, large scrolling image gallery on left.
Reviews section with elegant star ratings.

pages_blueprint.name: Customer Dashboard
features: Clean table lists for order history.
AI Recommendations tab based on past purchases.

special_features: AI Quizzes (Hair & Skin) guiding users to specific products.
Floating WhatsApp & Call buttons strictly placed in bottom-right/left.
Floating AI Chatbot for instant support.
Custom cursor or subtle scroll progress indicator for luxury feel.

ai_generation_prompts.logo: Minimalist luxury logo for Ayurvedic brand 'HAKKIVEDA', elegant serif typography, subtle tribal leaf motif, forest green and gold colors, white background, high-end vector style.
ai_generation_prompts.hero_banner: Wide-angle photograph of a mystical, sunlit herbal forest, rays of morning sunlight filtering through ancient trees, a luxurious amber glass cosmetic bottle resting on a mossy rock, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, depth of field.
ai_generation_prompts.product_mockup: Premium amber glass dropper bottle with a textured ivory paper label, gold cap, resting on a white marble surface surrounded by fresh green Ayurvedic herbs and a hint of gold dust, studio lighting, hyper-realistic.
ai_generation_prompts.heritage_visual: Abstract, respectful artistic representation of ancient tribal herbalism, earthy tones, terracotta, forest green, elegant silhouettes of hands grinding herbs in a stone mortar, soft lighting, gallery art style.

products_list: Hakkiveda Adivasi Herbal Hair Oil – 500ml and 250ml
Hakkiveda Body Wash for Skin Whitening & Tan Removal

testing.guideline: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute using kebab-case, role-based naming (e.g., 'data-testid="add-to-cart-button"').
